title: Q-learning
html: Stub. Off-policy temporal-difference RL algorithm. Yahir's OSU (2025-06-05 / 2025-06-09) tuned ε-greedy exploration: he found that lower ε (0.005) beat higher ε for win-rate after 100k episodes, learning that for his task less exploration → exploit-heavy policy paid off. Compared head-to-head with SARSA and Monte Carlo baselines.

related.label: Q-learning learning curve — ε=0.01 vs ε=0.95 over 100 episodes
Q-learning vs Monte Carlo — 100k-episode win-rate plot, ε=0.005 final choice
SARSA — ε=0.01 vs ε=0.95 exploration sweep
